title: arctium proliferum
intro: Arctium proliferum, also known as perennial burdock, is a biennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe, western Asia, and northern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing several health benefits, including improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Arctium proliferum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and its dried roots and leaves are also used in herbal remedies, such as capsules and infusions.
